Tomato___Bacterial_spot: Remove infected leaves, use copper-based fungicide, avoid overhead watering.
Tomato___Early_blight: Apply fungicide (chlorothalonil), rotate crops, remove debris.
Tomato___Late_blight: Destroy affected plants, apply mancozeb or chlorothalonil sprays.
Tomato___Leaf_Mold: Improve ventilation, use resistant varieties, apply fungicide.
Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot: Remove lower leaves, use copper fungicide, practice crop rotation.
Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider: Use neem oil or insecticidal soap.
Tomato___Target_Spot: Remove diseased leaves, apply protective fungicides.
Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus: Remove infected plants, disinfect tools, control aphids.
Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus: Control whiteflies, remove infected plants, use resistant seeds.
Tomato___healthy: Leaf appears healthy. Maintain balanced watering and nutrients.
